{{Quote|I'm twice the rider you'll ever be, rookie!|Redros to [[Revan/Legends|Revan]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref>}}
'''Redros''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Kadas'sa'Nikto/Legends|Kadas'sa'Nikto]] and a swoop racer for the [[Black Vulkars/Legends|Black Vulkars]] on [[Taris/Legends|Taris]] as of [[3956 BBY]]. He was considered to be the best swoop racer that the Vulkars had to offer. When [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] won the [[Tarisian Season Opener]] on Taris, [[Brejik]] declared that Revan had cheated and ordered his men to [[Death/Legends|kill]] everyone. In the ensuing fight Brejik, Redros, and many other Black Vulkars were killed by Revan and the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], [[Bastila Shan]].

==Appearances==
